title: Ops runbook + content review cadence + outcomes dashboard + maintenance rotation
context: Post-delivery sustainability requires an ops runbook, a runtime-enforced content review cadence (dynamic-answer refresh + official-change re-verification), an outcomes dashboard, and a named maintenance rotation, plus a gated process for adding languages/exams.
objective: Write the ops runbook, define and schedule the content review cadence, stand up the outcomes dashboard, and name the maintenance rotation.
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook covers deploy, content updates, source re-verification, and partner support

Content review cadence defined + scheduled: dynamic/officeholder items on a short cadence and on known changes (elections, official-question-set/test-version revisions flagged by the official-update watch); static civics facts on a longer cadence; HSE standards re-checked on revision - all driving the staleness fail-safe

Outcomes dashboard tracks learners reached, readiness improvement, and voluntary pass reports (not engagement metrics); named maintenance rotation; documented, reviewer-gated process for adding languages/exams
